There are 25 yet other comets born of Death, possessed of
crooked crests, rough and dark in colour. They appear in the
south and portend extensive mortality of human beings.
[Cf. nn—

There are 22 comets born of the Earth, which are round
like mirror, devoid of crest and possessed of rays. They resemble
the water or oil, appear in the North-east and portend famine.
[Cf. ipt—

There are three Ketus, born of the Moon, which are white
like the rays of the Moon, silver, snow, white lotus or the round
jasmine and which appear in the North and are conducive to
plenty of food crops.
[Cf. *pf—
J^r; ll]
